## Source: amazon-inspector (a556a5a46fe4be2c1c7662a6481c9086b192375a17d4dcdccfbe52564ed78571)
The package bytefrontier-tracker was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (26e9be31ec7e1528cbf35d3046ffdbf1eb7d14e7086554a97c8958094720dbf9)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bytefrontier-tracker' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
